message:
feat(runtime,conformance): wire BGREWRITEAOF through store flag, add BulkContainsAll matcher, expand fixtures

- Pass store to bgrewriteaof_cmd so it sets the new bgrewriteaof_requested
  flag; runtime consumes it after dispatch (mirrors debug_reload pattern)
- Simplify handle_debug_reload_requested: remove ephemeral-path special
  case, require configured RDB persistence, flatten match arms
- Add BulkContainsAll / BulkNotContainsAll expected-frame variants to
  conformance matcher for substring-based INFO field assertions
- Expand conformance fixtures: ACL save/load roundtrip, scripting edge
  cases, server INFO field coverage, connection command updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
